results.title: Underground Tunnel Trophy: McMackins' $85 Million Manalapan Estate Dominates Palm Beach Deals
results.description: An $85M Manalapan estate with a private beach tunnel topped Palm Beach's signed contracts, part of 15 luxury deals totaling roughly $210M the week of May 18–24.
